text: What if I told you fake surgery can actually ease pain? In clinical trials, sham procedures are showing surprising results. Patients experiencing real symptom changes—just from believing they had surgery. This ‘placebo effect’ reveals how powerful our expectations can be. Understanding this could reshape how we approach pain management. Curious about the mind-body connection? Like and follow for more insights!
